variants: Shivani Jadhav is currently employed at Ultravue Marketing, where she focuses on projects involving the Thai script. She was born in Floral Reach and went on to further her education at Mistvale School of Engineering. In her commitment to community service, Shivani dedicates her time to the Nutrition Educator Mangrove Pines, where her efforts help enhance nutrition knowledge among local residents. By combining her career expertise with her volunteer work, she reflects a deep commitment to bettering the health and wellbeing of her community.

After obtaining her degree from Mistvale School of Engineering, Shivani Jadhav embarked on a professional journey at Ultravue Marketing, applying her skills in Thai script. Her roots are in Floral Reach, where she was born and raised. To give back to the community that shaped her, Shivani also volunteers with Nutrition Educator Mangrove Pines. Through this organization, she actively works to promote better nutritional practices and education, showcasing her dedication to fostering healthier lifestyles in her community.
